final:
module counter_32bit (
    input obf_clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    output reg [31:0] count
);
    always @(posedge obf_clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 32'b0;
        end else if (en) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
